title: lissochilus pileatus
intro: Lissochilus pileatus, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lissochilus pileatus include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Herbal preparations of Lissochilus pileatus can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are typically prepared by steeping the plant's roots or flowers in water or other solvents.
